Creation I successfully created my digital FloCard profile by adding personal and professional information such as my name, contact details, email address, and social media links. I also exchanged digital

cards with at least three team members using the QR-based sharing feature, which made networking quick and efficient. 3. Understanding the FloCard Ecosystem Flow Individuals Flow For individuals, FloCard starts

with creating a digital profile containing professional and personal details such as name, phone number, email, and social links. Users can instantly share their profile through QR codes, making networking

simple, fast, and paperless. This helps professionals build stronger connections and maintain organized digital contacts. Communities Flow In communities, FloCard helps users create connected and verified networks. Members can discover

and interact with each other using organized contact systems and map-based location features. This improves communication, trust, collaboration, and engagement among community members. Tree Planters Flow For tree planters, FloCard

acts as a digital environmental tracking system. Users can record the number and location of planted trees, creating transparent records of green initiatives. This encourages environmental responsibility, community participation, and

better monitoring of plantation activities. Day 3 at 366Pi Technologies was a great learning experience. I explored how 366Pi combines technology with sustainability and learned about FloCard, a smart digital

networking platform. Creating my own FloCard and understanding its ecosystem for individuals, communities, and tree planters helped me understand the importance of digital connection and environmental responsibility.
